description: SDXL 1.0 + B&W Manga Block LoRA — bold monochrome line-art portrait style
_comment: LoRA by alvdansen. Bold black-and-white line illustration; research use only.
_comment_trigger: No trigger word needed. Short, simple subject prompts work best.
_comment_negative: Recommended: 'color, colorful, grey, grayscale' to enforce strict B&W output.
_comment_steps: 35 steps produces cleaner outlines than 30 for this high-contrast style.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7 keeps the stark line quality; higher values can cause blown-out blacks.
_comment_scale: lora_scale 1.0 = maximum style strength. Try 0.8 for softer lines.
_comment_size: SDXL native resolution 1024x1024. Portrait orientation (768x1024) also works well.
